response: You have a green HDMI cable; which of these wall sockets should you use: the round-pin, flat-pin, or three-pin variety?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a green hdmi. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
